commitMessage: Added new snap-area for portrait top/bottom (#1675)

other._0:
switch self {
        case .leftTopBottomHalf:
            return [.l]
        case .rightTopBottomHalf:
            return [.r]
        case .thirds:
            return [.t, .b]
        case .portraitThirdsSide:
            return [.l, .r]
        case .halves:

        case .fourths:
            return [.t, .b]
        case .portraitTopBottomHalves:
            return [.l, .r]
        }
